cross_reactivity: The 4 major ragweeds including short, giant, western, and false strongly cross-react.  Due to strong cross-reactivity between short, giant, western, and false ragweed species, it is not required to do skin tests or treat with multiple members instead a single choice suffices. A strong cross-reactivity is seen with ragweed and mugwort, marshelder or cocklebur (14).
